question:
Will AS Roma win on 2025-11-23?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for November 23, 2025
If AS Roma wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

Resolution source: https://www.legaseriea.it/

evidences.title: AS Roma vs Bologna – Predicted lineup and team news - Yahoo Sports
evidences.content: ... The Football Faithful # AS Roma vs Bologna – Predicted lineup and team news AS Roma vs Bologna – Predicted lineup and team news AS Roma begin their Serie A campaign with a home fixture against Bologna at the Stadio Olimpico on Saturday. The Giallorossi welcome the Rossoblu to Rome for their opening match of the 2025/26 season under new manager Gian Piero Gasperini. This could be the first competitive appearances for Roma’s summer signings, including Leon Bailey, who completed his loan move from Aston Villa with an option to buy. Gasperini’s side endured a mixed pre-season but will be eager to start the new campaign on a positive note. Roma take on Bologna in what promises to be an intriguing encounter between two sides with big ambitions. [...] ## How to Watch Roma vs Bologna? You can stream the match live on DAZN, which holds the exclusive broadcasting rights for Serie A matches in the UK for the 2025/26 season. evidences.title: AS Roma - Wikipedia
evidences.content: Its major founders Fortitudo and Alba having been relegated at the end of 1926–27 campaign, new-founded Roma had to take part to Southern First Division championship (Serie B) for its inaugural season. Nevertheless, the FIGC decided on a special enlargement of first level division re-admitting AS Roma and SSC Napoli. The first ever official matches participated in by Roma was in the National Division, the predecessor of Serie A, of 1927–28, against Livorno, a 2–0 Roma win. The biggest ever victory recorded by Roma was 9–0 against Cremonese during the 1929–30 Serie A season. The heaviest defeat Roma have ever suffered is 1–7, which has occurred five times; against Juventus in 1931–32, Torino in 1947–48, Manchester United in 2006–07, Bayern Munich in 2014–15 and Fiorentina in 2018–19. evidences.title: 2025/26 Europa League: Roma's league phase opponents! - AS Roma
evidences.content: Here's who we'll be up against! ## The format In the league phase, the top eight teams will qualify directly for the Round of 16. Teams ranked 9th to 16th will enter the playoffs as seeded teams, while those ranked 17th to 24th will take part as unseeded teams. The clubs finishing between25th and 36th place will be eliminated. ## Dates The league phase matches are scheduled for the following dates: Matchday 1: 24 and 25 September; Matchday 2: 2 October; Matchday 3: 23 October; Matchday 4: 6 November; Matchday 5: 27 November; Matchday 6: 11 December; Matchday 7: 22 January; Matchday 8: 29 January. UEFA will confirm the precise dates and kick-off times in the coming days. Keep your eye on our ticketing page to find out when tickets go on sale for our home games. evidences.title: UEFA Europa Conference League Odds 2025/26 - Betting Odds
evidences.content: ## Historical Context: Previous Winners The Conference League has a relatively short history compared to other major European football competitions, having only been founded in 2021. The previous winners are AS Roma (2021–22), West Ham United (2022–23), Olympiacos (2023–24), and Chelsea (2024–25). Fiorentina are the only team to have come runners-up twice in both 2023 and 2024. There has been no team so far which has been able to claim the Conference League trophy twice. With no past winners qualifying this season, 2025/2026 will also have no repeat winner.
